title: Contact the tribunal
genericGuidanceRep: Upload letters, photos or documents if they are relevant to the claimant’s application. Do not upload any other material.
contactApplicationTextRep: Give details of the claimant’s application in the text box or upload a file

content.text: Tell or ask the tribunal about something relevant to your case.
Do not use this form to:

items: seek legal advice from the tribunal. The tribunal is an independent judicial body and cannot give legal advice
tell us about settlement offers or discussions, which are private and confidential to the parties

contentRep.text: Tell or ask the tribunal about something relevant to the claimant’s case.
Do not use this form to:

items: seek legal advice from the tribunal. The tribunal is an independent judicial body and cannot give legal advice
tell us about settlement offers or discussions, which are private and confidential to the parties
